name: Shady Lane Cherry-Berry-Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C).
2. Combine fruits in a bowl and sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. Add 1/2 cup granulated sugar, 1/2 cup packed brown sugar, 1/4 cup flour, salt, and cinnamon. Stir gently.
4. Pour mixture into prepared piecrust.
5. To make topping, combine remaining 1/2 cup granulated sugar, remaining 1/2 cup packed brown sugar, and remaining 3/4 cup flour. Add butter and cut in with two knives or a pastry blender until the mixture is crumbly.
6. Sprinkle the crumbly topping over the pie.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and bake an additional 45-50 minutes.
8. Makes 8 servings.
